title: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
heading: Student
parentHeadings: Clever LMS Connect - Gradebook Sync Beginner's Guide
content:
#### Student

Once you've created a submission, you can also take a look from the student perspective. Please reach out to [\[email protected\]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#573e392332302536233e38392417343b322132257934383a) to request end-user credentials for testing.

![Description of the image](https://files.readme.io/a68d3af332616321d4b5574360b7405c11207d64a666144b8b6a00751fe2b9f1-image.png)  
_The graded submission from the student view_

  
Canvas
